name: IdsClmLnCchgRplcLoad

text.value: WITH SourceData AS (SELECT CLM_LN_CCHG_SK AS CLM_LN_CCHG_RPLC_SK, CLM_ID, CLM_LN_SEQ_NO, CLM_SRC_SYS_CD_SK, PRCS_YR_MO_SK, SRC_SYS_CD_SK, CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, CCHG_MULT_CAT_GRP_SK, CLM_SK, CLM_LN_SK, '@{pipeline().parameters.VersionId}' AS VRSN_ID FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.CLM_LN_CCHG_TMP_IdsClmLnCchgRplcLoad) MERGE @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CLM_LN_CCHG_RPLC T USING SourceData S ON (T.CLM_LN_CCHG_RPLC_SK = S.CLM_LN_CCHG_RPLC_SK) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET T.CLM_ID = S.CLM_ID, T.CLM_LN_SEQ_NO = S.CLM_LN_SEQ_NO, T.CLM_SRC_SYS_CD_SK = S.CLM_SRC_SYS_CD_SK, T.PRCS_YR_MO_SK = S.PRCS_YR_MO_SK, T.SRC_SYS_CD_SK = S.SRC_SYS_CD_SK, T.CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK = S.CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, T.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK = S.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, T.CCHG_MULT_CAT_GRP_SK = S.CCHG_MULT_CAT_GRP_SK, T.CLM_SK = S.CLM_SK, T.CLM_LN_SK = S.CLM_LN_SK, T.VRSN_ID = S.VRSN_ID WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (CLM_LN_CCHG_RPLC_SK, CLM_ID, CLM_LN_SEQ_NO, CLM_SRC_SYS_CD_SK, PRCS_YR_MO_SK, SRC_SYS_CD_SK, CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, CCHG_MULT_CAT_GRP_SK, CLM_SK, CLM_LN_SK, VRSN_ID) VALUES (S.CLM_LN_CCHG_RPLC_SK, S.CLM_ID, S.CLM_LN_SEQ_NO, S.CLM_SRC_SYS_CD_SK, S.PRCS_YR_MO_SK, S.SRC_SYS_CD_SK, S.CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, S.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, S.CCHG_MULT_CAT_GRP_SK, S.CLM_SK, S.CLM_LN_SK, S.VRSN_ID);

Description:
CALLED BY: CblTalnCchgLoadSeq

PROCESSING:  Loads data into CCHG_MULT_CAT_GRP table and rejected records into a Rej file. 
                                                                
     
MODIFICATIONS:

Update Term date for old records in After load SQL
Read Load File created in the FKEY job

Load CLM_LN_CCHG_RPLC table
Load rejects are redirected into a Reject file
